name: goal-shaper
description: Shape fuzzy requests into verifiable Codex Goal mode packages.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough requests into verifiable Codex goals
interface.longDescription: Use Goal Shaper to decide whether a task belongs in Codex Goal mode, interview for missing outcome and verification details, and produce a copyable /goal package with evidence, assumptions, safety boundaries, and durable guidance candidates.
defaultPrompt: Shape my rough task into a safe Codex /goal.
Turn my request into a verifiable Goal mode package.
